tailwind.colorTokens: primary, background, foreground, muted, accent (HSL-CSS-var pattern)

patterns.spacing: @stackshift-ui/section wraps content; gap-8 for cluster, py-20 for vertical rhythm
patterns.typography: Inter sans. Heading components from @stackshift-ui/heading (variant prop); Text components from @stackshift-ui/text
conventions: Import HeroVariantProps from the contract file; do NOT redefine the interface
Destructure every prop; use `?? undefined` for optionals
Return null when required props are absent
Default export only — no additional named exports
Use @stackshift-ui/* primitives, not raw HTML for headings/text/buttons
